findings.message: New pydantic field `widget_timeout_s` (env prefix APP_, so consumed as APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S) is added to Settings but is not declared in .env.example. A variable consumed in config/settings.py with no corresponding .env.example entry breaks DEV→CI→STAGE→PROD env-var parity: operators have no documented surface to set the widget timeout per environment, so it silently falls back to the hardcoded 5.0s default everywhere.
findings.suggestion: Add `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S=5.0` to the framework-managed block of .env.example (alongside the other APP_ vars) so the new variable is part of the declared environment surface.
